blocks.title: Beautiful React Websites with WordPress CMS & Hosting Included
blocks.body: Launch a premium React frontend connected to WordPress content, WooCommerce selling tools, managed hosting, and support from one place.

gridItems.title: React storefront
gridItems.text: Cinematic pages, fast navigation, modern product browsing, and polished interaction states.

gridItems.title: WordPress control room
gridItems.text: Menus, media, pages, products, forms, and content remain editable without rebuilding the site.

gridItems.title: Hosting included
gridItems.text: Deployment, updates, performance care, and support are part of the website plan.

sections.title: Why classic websites feel limited
sections.body: Most small business websites separate design, content, commerce, hosting, and support into disconnected pieces. That makes every improvement slower than it should be.

badges.title: Slow design changes
badges.body: Simple page updates become tickets, plugins, theme edits, or risky layout work.

badges.title: Outdated shop experience
badges.body: Classic commerce pages often feel heavy, generic, and disconnected from the brand.

badges.title: Scattered hosting/support
badges.body: Domain, hosting, developer, CMS, and shop issues live in different places.

badges.title: Hard content management
badges.body: Teams need a practical CMS, but customers still deserve a modern frontend.

sections.title: One modern website system
sections.body: React frontend + WordPress CMS + WooCommerce + managed hosting, packaged as a clear service instead of a scattered technical puzzle.

blocks.title: A premium frontend with a familiar content engine behind it.
blocks.body: Your visitors get a polished React website. Your team keeps WordPress for everyday content and WooCommerce for product management.

gridItems.text: Modern page transitions, flexible layouts, and frontend polish.

gridItems.text: Products, categories, cart, checkout, accounts, and orders.

gridItems.text: Deployment, performance care, SSL, updates, and support.

sections.title: From idea to live website without the usual maze
sections.body: A clear path for clients who want a modern website without managing every technical layer themselves.
